subject: Allstate Adjuster Roster — consolidated from captured threads
denialText: Allstate routes through claims@claims.allstate.com with adjuster phone routing per file. Allstate Vehicle and Property Insurance Company + Allstate Indemnity Company are the two main entities seen. Encompass Insurance Company is the Allstate/National General subsidiary (Catastrophe National Catastrophe Team NCT 1200). Allstate is one of top 3 P&C AI patent holders per Insurance Journal 2025 (US11720971 + US11798095 + US11257132 + US11348134).

adjusterRoster.name: Alicia Janay Williams
adjusterRoster.title: Allstate Vehicle and Property Insurance
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: Standard estimate-issued template with supplement-request path

adjusterRoster.name: James Cherry II
adjusterRoster.title: Allstate claims
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: DUAL-CLAIM SHELL GAME — redirects supplement requests between claim numbers. Acknowledges damage verbally but denies in writing. Cites internal leadership consultation as cover.

adjusterRoster.name: Sarah Sowers
adjusterRoster.title: Allstate Indemnity Company
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: 4-PIVOT BAD-FAITH PATTERN: (1) blame pre-policy hail, (2) cite unverified 2.25" magnitude, (3) pivot to 'no hail >0.25" in 23 days', (4) declare impasse + dispute resolution. Did NOT produce evidence for any pivot.

adjusterRoster.name: ShaJerrica Foley
adjusterRoster.title: Encompass Catastrophe Adjuster - NCT 1200 (National Catastrophe Team)
adjusterRoster.subsidiary: Encompass Insurance Company / Allstate + National General
adjusterRoster.denialPattern: ASYMMETRIC EVIDENCE BAD-FAITH: cites 'available weather data' but refuses to identify sources across 3+ requests. Closes with 'Have a great day' to terminate.

templatePhrases: I have attached a copy of your estimate for your records
If the contractor estimates are all within our Replacement Cost amount, then there is no need to reach out beforehand
CONFIDENTIALITY/PRIVACY NOTICE: This e-mail, including any attachments, may contain personal, private and confidential information
Please do not delete your unique Conversation ID
Allstate Vehicle and Property Insurance Company
It has been my pleasure to assist you during this difficult time
you will need to dispute the denial under the new claim
we have reached an impasse regarding this
I would like to direct your attention to the dispute resolution process outlined in the homeowners policy
the damages your contractor wants to claim were not present at the time of loss for this claim
we use a variety of weather reports
keyDenialLanguage: estimates that are higher than the Replacement Cost amount on my estimate
this is not how insurance works
the damages your contractor wants to claim were not present at the time of loss
based on the available weather data
we use a variety of weather reports
carrierTactic: Allstate's biggest red flags: (1) DUAL-CLAIM SHELL GAME (Cherry) — bouncing supplement requests between claim numbers, (2) PIVOTING DENIALS (Sowers) — when one rationale falls, another is substituted from AI's ranked-reason list, (3) ASYMMETRIC EVIDENCE (Foley/Encompass) — cite undisclosed data sources. All three are documented bad-faith patterns admissible under 2026 case law.
rooferTactic: GOLD STANDARD escalation template per Luis Esteves (see Ali/0722264736 dump): (1) supervisor escalation request, (2) Allstate STAFF adjuster reinspection — NOT third-party, (3) specific policy language citation demand, (4) Virginia State Corporation Commission complaint threat. For pivoting denials: document each contradictory carrier position with timestamps. For Foley-style asymmetry: 3+ explicit requests for evidence basis builds the regulatory record.
patentMapping: Allstate's 4 main patents (US11720971 ML accident assessment, US11798095 commercial claims ML, US11257132 surface dimension AI, US11348134 data processing ML) drive the AI-determined denial outcomes. When human adjuster pivots between rationales, that's the AI's ranked-reason list emitting alternate basis when first is challenged.
lessonForAnalyzer: For Allstate: identify the subsidiary (AVPIC vs Indemnity vs Encompass NGIC). Each has slightly different escalation hierarchy. Luis Esteves's 4-demand template is the canonical counter for ANY Allstate denial cascade. For Encompass specifically (Foley pattern): demand source identification 3x + escalate to DOI when refused — this builds clean bad-faith preservation record.
